title: excel found unreadable content in .xlsx.Do you want to recover error the contents of this workbook? While using excel-js module also, a tab called recovered sheet is added to the file.
author: satspl
body:
excel found unreadable content in .xlsx.Do you want to recover error the contents of this workbook? While using excel-js module also, a tab called recovered sheet is added to the file.

_Originally posted by @satspl in https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/issues/106#issuecomment-470489797_

comments.author: gabrielsam-topstack
comments.body: Hello , I am having the same error thrown after opening the generated file . Any clue why is that ?

comments.author: tfbartels
comments.body: Hello, I was having the same problem. In my case, there was a bug in my JavaScript code.  The problem happened because of a parseInt in a null attribute. That generated a NaN value in excel file.
